name: Interactive Kanban Board
description:
Build an interactive **Kanban board** for a product team (dense app UI, not marketing). Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS; Google Fonts OK; no frameworks.

## Product
Board title **Sprint Board**. Columns: Backlog → In Progress → Review → Done.

## Required DOM
1. App header `#board-header` with title `#board-title` text matching /Sprint Board/i, and button `#btn-add-card` (Add card).
2. Board `#kanban-board` with exactly 4 columns `.kanban-column` with `data-column` in {backlog, progress, review, done}.
3. Each column has: `.column-header`, `.column-title`, count badge `.column-count`, and cards container `.column-cards` with a unique id: `#col-backlog` `#col-progress` `#col-review` `#col-done`.
4. Seed ≥6 cards `.kanban-card` distributed across columns. Each card needs:
   - unique `data-card-id`
   - `.card-title`
   - `.card-meta` (assignee or tag text)
   - priority pill `.card-priority` with data-priority in {low,med,high} OR class priority-low|priority-med|priority-high
   - button `.card-move-next` (move to next column) and optional `.card-delete`
5. New-card form `#new-card-form` (can be in a modal `#new-card-modal` or inline panel): inputs `#new-card-title` `#new-card-assignee`, select `#new-card-priority`, buttons `#new-card-cancel` `#new-card-submit`.
6. Live filter `#filter-priority` (All/Low/Med/High) hiding non-matching cards.
7. Empty column state: when a column has 0 visible cards, show `.column-empty` inside that column (or toggle visibility).

## Behavior
- `#btn-add-card` reveals form/modal; submit creates a card in **Backlog** with classes above and increments counts.
- `.card-move-next` moves card to the next column in order backlog→progress→review→done; on Done, either disable move or cycle stops.
- Update `.column-count` to reflect card counts after add/move/delete.
- `#filter-priority` filters cards without destroying them.
- Optional: HTML5 drag-and-drop between `.column-cards` is a plus but not required if move buttons work.

## Visual
Compact product board: column backgrounds, card elevation, priority colors. CSS variables. Works on desktop width ≥1000px; horizontal scroll OK on small screens (`#kanban-board` overflow-x auto).

Reply FINISHED when add/move/filter and counts work.
source: Common coding-agent interactive UI tasks (kanban/project board) + FrontendBench L3 interaction density + product dashboard patterns (Refero-style).
